title: Store: chart aggregation query + zero-fill

title: Handler: GET /api/usage/chart param validation
verification: Valid period+granularity returns {data,error} envelope with snake_case arrays; default granularity by period; invalid period/granularity → 400; go test ./api/... -count=1 green.

title: Store + handlers: bulk disable/enable connections
verification: bulk-disable touches only at/below-threshold connections and returns affected ids; bulk-enable skips connections without remaining quota; audit_log row written with affected ids; go test ./... -count=1 green.
